name: dnsrpc_restart_server
help: Issues the ADIDNS server to restart
long_help: Issues the ADIDNS server to restart. Important note: if the DC for whatever reason can't touch the DLL payload you set via `dnsrpc_set_plugin_dll`, it will refuse to start back up and you'll likely cripple the entire domain, consider testing if the DC can connect back to your share using `dnsrpc_coerce_write`  before you accidentally nuke the target. Requires that the current process token belongs to a user which is a member of the DnsAdmins group. Note: Uses experimental exception hooking and may cause beacon instability.
